general.name: General Call to Action
general.template:
<cta_instruction>
Call to Action Strategy: Direct Conversion
Primary Directive: {{cta}}
Ensure the CTA is spoken clearly in the final 5 seconds and displayed visually on screen with high contrast.
</cta_instruction>

eng_1.name: Engagement — Comment Your Opinion
eng_1.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Comment Opinion)
Template: 'Do you agree or disagree with this? Drop your honest opinion in the comments below!'
</cta_instruction>

eng_2.name: Engagement — Answer the Question
eng_2.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Answer Question)
Template: 'What is the biggest challenge you are facing with {{goal}} right now? Tell me below so I can make a video about it!'
</cta_instruction>

eng_3.name: Engagement — Vote in Comments
eng_3.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Vote in Comments)
Template: 'Type 1 if you prefer strategy A, or type 2 if you prefer strategy B in the comments!'
</cta_instruction>

eng_4.name: Engagement — Tag a Friend
eng_4.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Tag a Friend)
Template: 'Tag a friend or business partner who needs to see this before tomorrow!'
</cta_instruction>

eng_5.name: Engagement — Fill in the Blank
eng_5.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Fill in the Blank)
Template: 'Fill in the blank: My #1 goal for 2026 is ________. Let us see who dreams the biggest!'
</cta_instruction>

eng_6.name: Engagement — Rate Your Experience
eng_6.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Rate Experience)
Template: 'On a scale of 1 to 10, how satisfied are you with your current {{goal}}? Be honest!'
</cta_instruction>

eng_7.name: Engagement — Challenge the Host
eng_7.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Challenge Host)
Template: 'Think I missed a step? Prove me wrong in the comments below!'
</cta_instruction>

eng_8.name: Engagement — Emoji Reaction
eng_8.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Engagement (Emoji Reaction)
Template: 'Drop a 🔥 emoji in the comments if you are going to test this today!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_1.name: Leads — Keyword DM Automation
lead_1.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Keyword DM)
Template: 'Comment the word "GUIDE" below and I will instantly DM you my free blueprint for {{goal}}!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_2.name: Leads — Link in Bio Checklist
lead_2.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Link in Bio Checklist)
Template: 'Click the link in my bio to download the free checklist and start {{goal}} today!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_3.name: Leads — Masterclass Registration
lead_3.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Masterclass Registration)
Template: 'We are hosting a live masterclass this Thursday on {{goal}}. Comment "LIVE" to grab your seat!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_4.name: Leads — Free Audit Offer
lead_4.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Free Audit Offer)
Template: 'Comment "AUDIT" and my team will do a free video review of your current strategy!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_5.name: Leads — Newsletter Signup
lead_5.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Newsletter Signup)
Template: 'Join 10,000+ {{audience}} receiving our weekly tips. Hit the link in bio to subscribe free!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_6.name: Leads — Template Download
lead_6.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Template Download)
Template: 'Want the exact Notion template I showed in this video? Comment "TEMPLATE" and it is yours!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_7.name: Leads — Quiz Assessment
lead_7.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Quiz Assessment)
Template: 'Take the 60-second assessment in my bio to find out what is holding back your {{goal}}!'
</cta_instruction>

lead_8.name: Leads — Case Study Breakdown
lead_8.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Lead Generation (Case Study Breakdown)
Template: 'Comment "CASE STUDY" and I will send you the private 15-minute breakdown video!'
</cta_instruction>

sale_1.name: Sales — Limited Time Discount
sale_1.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Direct Sales (Limited Time Discount)
Template: 'We are offering 50% off for the next 24 hours only! Click the link in bio to claim your spot before it closes!'
</cta_instruction>

sale_2.name: Sales — Book a Discovery Call
sale_2.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Direct Sales (Discovery Call)
Template: 'Ready to scale to {{goal}} this quarter? Click the link in bio to book your 1-on-1 strategy call with our team!'
</cta_instruction>

sale_3.name: Sales — Product Launch Drop
sale_3.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Direct Sales (Product Launch Drop)
Template: 'The new collection is officially live! Head to the link in bio to shop before your size sells out!'
</cta_instruction>

sale_4.name: Sales — VIP Waitlist Enrollment
sale_4.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Direct Sales (VIP Waitlist)
Template: 'Doors open next Monday. Comment "VIP" to get early access and our exclusive founder discount!'
</cta_instruction>

sale_5.name: Sales — Risk-Free Guarantee Offer
sale_5.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Direct Sales (Risk-Free Guarantee)
Template: 'Try it 100% risk-free for 30 days. If you do not achieve {{goal}}, we refund every penny. Link in bio!'
</cta_instruction>

sale_6.name: Sales — Bundle Upgrade
sale_6.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Direct Sales (Bundle Upgrade)
Template: 'Get the complete toolkit bundle for 60% off today only. Check the bio link to upgrade!'
</cta_instruction>

sale_7.name: Sales — Founder Consultation
sale_7.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Direct Sales (Founder Consultation)
Template: 'I am taking on 3 private clients this month to help them achieve {{goal}}. DM me "GROWTH" to apply!'
</cta_instruction>

comm_1.name: Community — Join Discord/Telegram
comm_1.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Community Building (Join Discord/Telegram)
Template: 'Join our free Discord community of 5,000+ {{audience}} sharing daily tips! Link in bio!'
</cta_instruction>

comm_2.name: Community — Share Your Milestone
comm_2.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Community Building (Share Milestone)
Template: 'What was your biggest win this week? Celebrate in the comments so our community can cheer you on!'
</cta_instruction>

comm_3.name: Community — Attend Weekly Q&A
comm_3.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Community Building (Weekly Q&A)
Template: 'We go live every Friday at 2 PM for community Q&A. Drop your questions below and set your reminder!'
</cta_instruction>

comm_4.name: Community — Founder Story Feedback
comm_4.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Community Building (Story Feedback)
Template: 'Did this story resonate with your journey? Let me know in the comments below!'
</cta_instruction>

comm_5.name: Community — Member Spotlight Nomination
comm_5.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Community Building (Spotlight Nomination)
Template: 'Know a {{audience}} who deserves a shoutout? Tag them below for our weekly community spotlight!'
</cta_instruction>

comm_6.name: Community — Co-Create Next Video
comm_6.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Community Building (Co-Create Video)
Template: 'What topic should we cover in Part 2? Vote for your favorite idea in the comments!'
</cta_instruction>

comm_7.name: Community — Accountability Partner
comm_7.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Community Building (Accountability Partner)
Template: 'Comment "READY" below and reply to someone else to find your accountability partner for {{goal}}!'
</cta_instruction>

fol_1.name: Follow — Part 2 Reminder
fol_1.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Follow Growth (Part 2 Reminder)
Template: 'Hit that follow button right now so you do not miss Part 2 tomorrow!'
</cta_instruction>

fol_2.name: Follow — Daily Value Promise
fol_2.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Follow Growth (Daily Value Promise)
Template: 'Follow me for daily, no-BS breakdowns on how to achieve {{goal}} without stress!'
</cta_instruction>

fol_3.name: Follow — Join the Movement
fol_3.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Follow Growth (Join the Movement)
Template: 'Follow our page to join 50,000+ {{audience}} mastering their craft every single day!'
</cta_instruction>

fol_4.name: Follow — Behind the Scenes Access
fol_4.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Follow Growth (Behind the Scenes)
Template: 'Follow along as I document my raw 90-day journey to scaling {{brand}} to $1M!'
</cta_instruction>

fol_5.name: Follow — The Anti-Guru Feed
fol_5.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Follow Growth (Anti-Guru Feed)
Template: 'Tired of generic advice? Follow me for actionable, data-backed strategies that actually work!'
</cta_instruction>

fol_6.name: Follow — Weekly Case Studies
fol_6.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Follow Growth (Weekly Case Studies)
Template: 'Follow now to get our weekly real-world case studies delivered right to your feed!'
</cta_instruction>

fol_7.name: Follow — Turn on Notifications
fol_7.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Follow Growth (Turn on Notifications)
Template: 'Hit follow and tap the bell icon so you never miss an urgent industry alert!'
</cta_instruction>

sav_1.name: Save — Bookmark for Later Reference
sav_1.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Save / Bookmark (Later Reference)
Template: 'Save this reel right now so you can use this exact formula when you plan your next campaign!'
</cta_instruction>

sav_2.name: Save — Cheat Sheet Bookmark
sav_2.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Save / Bookmark (Cheat Sheet)
Template: 'Hit the save button—this is your permanent cheat sheet for mastering {{goal}}!'
</cta_instruction>

sav_3.name: Save — Step-by-Step Recipe/Routine
sav_3.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Save / Bookmark (Recipe/Routine)
Template: 'Save this video so you do not forget the measurements when you try this tomorrow morning!'
</cta_instruction>

sav_4.name: Save — Tool Stack List
sav_4.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Save / Bookmark (Tool Stack List)
Template: 'Save this post! You will want to refer back to these 5 AI tools every single week!'
</cta_instruction>

sav_5.name: Save — Emergency Troubleshooting
sav_5.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Save / Bookmark (Emergency Troubleshooting)
Template: 'Bookmark this reel so you know exactly how to fix your strategy when engagement drops!'
</cta_instruction>

sav_6.name: Save — Weekly Workout/Routine
sav_6.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Save / Bookmark (Weekly Routine)
Template: 'Save this video to your workout folder and crush this routine at the gym on Monday!'
</cta_instruction>

shr_1.name: Share — Send to a Co-Founder/Partner
shr_1.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Share / Amplification (Send to Partner)
Template: 'Share this reel with your business partner or co-founder so you are both on the same page!'
</cta_instruction>

shr_2.name: Share — Post to Your IG Story
shr_2.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Share / Amplification (Post to Story)
Template: 'Share this to your story right now to help another {{audience}} who might be struggling!'
</cta_instruction>

shr_3.name: Share — Send to Someone Who Needs This
shr_3.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Share / Amplification (Send to Someone in Need)
Template: 'DM this video to a friend who needs a boost of motivation today!'
</cta_instruction>

shr_4.name: Share — Team Slack/Discord Drop
shr_4.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Share / Amplification (Team Slack Drop)
Template: 'Drop this video into your team Slack channel to upgrade your workflow this week!'
</cta_instruction>

shr_5.name: Share — Challenge a Competitor/Friend
shr_5.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Share / Amplification (Challenge Friend)
Template: 'Send this to a friend and challenge them to complete this 7-day sprint with you!'
</cta_instruction>

shr_6.name: Share — Spread the Awareness
shr_6.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Share / Amplification (Spread Awareness)
Template: 'Help us spread the truth! Share this video to educate your audience!'
</cta_instruction>

shr_7.name: Share — Viral Gift Drop
shr_7.template:
<cta_instruction>
CTA Objective: Share / Amplification (Viral Gift)
Template: 'Share this reel with 3 friends and comment "DONE" to enter our weekly giveaway!'
</cta_instruction>
